member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.PointArmHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the PointArmHelper for sending a PointArm
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the PointArm
to.
member.remarks: BEHAVIOURS REFERENCED: AnimPose - allows animPose to override body parts: Arms (useLeftArm, useRightArm).
